steps.name: Create StapleChecklist component
steps.criteria: StapleChecklist component renders alphabetically sorted list of all staples; each staple shows name and a toggle button; staples already on the trip show as checked; tapping an unchecked staple calls onAddStaple; tapping a checked staple calls onRemoveStaple
steps.scenario_name: staple checklist renders sorted list with toggle

steps.name: Integrate StapleChecklist into HomeView whiteboard phase
steps.criteria: When all areas are complete in HomeView, StapleChecklist appears below the whiteboard prompt and QuickAdd; adding a staple from the checklist adds it to the trip with source 'whiteboard'; removing it removes from trip

steps.name: Staples already on trip show as checked in checklist
steps.criteria: Staples that were preloaded during the sweep phase appear as already checked in the checklist; only staples NOT currently on the trip show as unchecked and available to add
steps.scenario_name: preloaded staples show as already on trip
